ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of the vehicle (e.g., drone, airplane) */,
  "vehicle_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Unique registration number for legal and identification purposes */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number for internal tracking */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance event */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the vehicle (e.g., active, maintenance, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture */,
  "manufacturing_location" TEXT /* Location where the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "total_flight_time" REAL /* Total flight hours of the vehicle */,
  "battery_type" TEXT /* Type of battery used in the vehicle */,
  "battery_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the battery in mAh */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_metadata_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "flight_date" TEXT /* Date of the flight */,
  "flight_time" TEXT /* Time of the flight */,
  "flight_duration" REAL /* Duration of the flight in minutes */,
  "start_location" TEXT /* Starting location of the flight */,
  "end_location" TEXT /* Ending location of the flight */,
  "pilot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pilot who operated the flight */,
  "flight_mission" TEXT /* Purpose or mission of the flight */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the flight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_pilot_id FOREIGN KEY ("pilot_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight parameter record */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the vehicle */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the vehicle */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the vehicle */,
  "yaw" REAL /* Yaw of the vehicle */,
  "roll" REAL /* Roll of the vehicle */,
  "pitch" REAL /* Pitch of the vehicle */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the vehicle */,
  "heading" REAL /* Heading direction of the vehicle */,
  "vertical_speed" REAL /* Vertical speed (climb/descent rate) */,
  "ground_speed" REAL /* Ground speed of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_parameters_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sensor_location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor on the vehicle */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "sensor_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the sensor */,
  "sensor_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "reading_value" REAL /* Value of the sensor reading */,
  "reading_time" TEXT /* Time of the sensor reading */,
  "sensor_status" TEXT /* Status of the sensor during the reading (e.g., normal, fault) */,
  "sensor_reading_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the sensor reading (e.g., °C, %) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, engineer, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for notifications */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "last_login_time" TEXT /* Time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" REAL /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date of the alert event */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time of the alert event */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., low battery, system failure) */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the alert */,
  "alert_resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the alert has been resolved */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was resolved */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification event */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Time of the notification event */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "component_type" TEXT /* Type of the component (e.g., engine, propeller) */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "component_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the component */,
  "component_model" TEXT /* Model of the component */,
  "component_manufacturing_date" TEXT /* Date of manufacture of the component */,
  "component_warranty_expiration" TEXT /* Warranty expiration date of the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_components_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component reading */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "reading_value" REAL /* Value of the component reading */,
  "reading_time" TEXT /* Time of the component reading */,
  "component_status" TEXT /* Status of the component during the reading (e.g., normal, fault) */,
  "component_reading_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the component reading (e.g., RPM, °C) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_readings_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_readings_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES vehicle_components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance event */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  "maintenance_location" TEXT /* Location where the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance event */,
  "maintenance_performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_maintenance_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("maintenance_performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the maintenance event */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the maintenance event */,
  "maintenance_duration" REAL /* Duration of the maintenance event */,
  "maintenance_tool_used" TEXT /* Tools used during the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_parts_replaced" TEXT /* Parts replaced during the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES vehicle_components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_maintenance_id FOREIGN KEY ("maintenance_id") REFERENCES maintenance ("maintenance_id")
)
